prompt_snapshot:
16:9 horizontal Chinese blog cover illustration, 2560x1440.
Use the provided chibi Avilia reference as the character identity anchor.

Scene: Avilia transforms a straight process line into a flexible system web. On the left is a simple line: "获取数据 → 回测 → 可视化 → 买卖点". On the right, modules become a clean web of reusable blocks. Avilia carefully ties the connections.

Core meaning: building a larger quant system requires moving from process thinking to architecture thinking.

Style: clean Chinese technical blog illustration, white space, black/red/white, small blue connection nodes. Minimal labels: "线", "网", "结构".

Avoid dense UML, avoid PPT style, avoid too many arrows.
